market_pulse: Strong Friday momentum across LIV properties with David Guetta at LIV Beach (4/18), Zedd headlining OMNIA (4/17), and XS maintaining premium positioning; weekend readiness HIGH.

weekend_readiness.label: PEAK
factors: David Guetta confirmed at LIV Beach tomorrow (4/18)
Major talent stacked across all competing venues
High social engagement signals from competitor accounts
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Capitalize on weekend surge: Push LIV Beach David Guetta event hard; cross-promote with nightclub; deploy influencer testimonials from recent @globeth0tter features.

content_gaps.description: Competitors (Zouk, OMNIA, XS) heavily using EDM festival collaborations (EDC Week content, spring lineup announcements). LIV minimal presence.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create festival-crossover content: "EDC Week at LIV" reels, countdown posts, artist features.

content_gaps.description: XS and Encore Beach Club posting staff/setup content. LIV minimal BTS coverage.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Film brief BTS during setup/talent arrival; post to Stories with 24h countdown angle.

content_gaps.description: Competitors partnering with Vegas TikTok creators (@globeth0tter review 175 likes on XS). LIV relying on promoter accounts.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Reach out to @globeth0tter with exclusive LIV Beach pass; coordinate creator takeover on April 18 (David Guetta day).

influencer_activity.mention: Reviewed LIV Nightclub favorably as guest list attendee; also reviewed XS with honest takes. Strong Vegas nightlife authority (2M+ reach engagement signals). Multi-club reviewer.
Created viral content about competing venues (Hakkasan, TAO Beach, OMNIA life-changing chandelier post: 2.3M likes). Established promoter influencer with exclusive access.
XS/Encore exclusive promoter (176K followers, 1,799 posts). High-volume guest list authority for Wynn properties.

liv_outreach_targets.action: Invite to LIV Beach David Guetta event (4/18); request honest review video.
Partner for exclusive LIV feature (pending approval); highlight Halo architecture vs competitors.
